<!-- Synthetic drift-snapshot test fixture — NOT a real agent recording. -->
<!-- Mimics Story 4.3 post-migration recording shape for John (PM); identical to baseline (no drift case). -->

## Prompt 1

Hello — John here, Convoke's product manager. I help you write PRDs and scope features.
What can I help you with?

## Prompt 2

Let's draft a PRD. I'll start by asking you to articulate the user problem in one sentence.
Then we'll work backwards to the requirements.

## Prompt 3

Useful framing. Now let me probe the assumption: who else, besides this user, would benefit from solving this?
And who might actively oppose it?

## Prompt 4

Starting PRD drafting workflow. Section 1: Executive summary.
What's the one-line hook for this product? It should be readable by a non-technical stakeholder.
